scripts.build:web: expo export --platform web --output-dir dist --clear && touch dist/.nojekyll && cp assets/icon.png dist/apple-touch-icon.png && mkdir -p dist/static/js && cp dist/_expo/static/js/web/*.js dist/static/js/bundle.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const h=fs.readFileSync('dist/index.html','utf8');fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.html',h.replace(/src=\".*_expo.*\.js\"/,'src=\"/parking-riverain-bxl/static/js/bundle.js\"'))"
scripts.deploy: npm run build:web && git checkout --orphan gh-pages-tmp && git --work-tree=dist add --all && git --work-tree=dist commit -m 'Deploy' && git push origin HEAD:gh-pages --force && git checkout -f main && git branch -D gh-pages-tmp
